title: lucilia nivalis
intro: Lucilia nivalis, also known as White Butterfly Clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Lucilia nivalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
